summary: Iteration 11 - Comprehensive testing of Soul Food Store soft launch features. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Landing page loads without selectedSeries null reference crash, Store page shows all sections (Featured, Instant Access, Pre-Order, Free Resources), Pentecost countdown displays ~49 days, navigation links work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: selectedSeries null reference fix verified working - SoulFoodApp.js uses selectedSeries?.available
GET /api/payments/catalog returns 48 products with correct structure
GET /api/payments/catalog/csv returns downloadable CSV with proper headers
All 7 coupon codes validated: WELCOME10 (10%), SOFU5 ($5), GAMENIGHT ($10), SoulX1079 (15%), SoulX1072 (10%), DOLLARTEST ($1 override)
Coming Soon subscription section has construction sign overlay (🚧 emojis with amber gradient)
test_credentials: Coupon codes: WELCOME10, SOFU5, GAMENIGHT, DOLLARTEST, SoulX1079, SoulX1072
seed_data_creation: None - coupons auto-seeded from DEFAULT_COUPONS in coupon_routes.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All soft launch features verified working. Landing page selectedSeries null fix confirmed. Catalog API returns 48 products. All coupon codes validate correctly. Checkout creates Stripe sessions. Pentecost countdown shows ~49 days.

landing_page_loads.details: Landing page (/) loads without errors - selectedSeries?.available fix working

store_page_sections.details: Store page (/quick-order) shows Featured, Instant Access, Pre-Order, Free Resources sections

catalog_api_json.details: GET /api/payments/catalog returns 48 products with full JSON structure

coupon_sofu5.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with SOFU5 returns $5 fixed discount

coupon_gamenight.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with GAMENIGHT returns $10 fixed discount

coupon_soulx1079.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with SoulX1079 (Dee contributor) returns 15% discount

coupon_soulx1072.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with SoulX1072 (Temia contributor) returns 10% discount

coupon_dollartest.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with DOLLARTEST returns override_total of $1.00

coupon_invalid.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with invalid code returns valid=false

checkout_stripe_session.details: POST /api/payments/checkout/cart creates Stripe checkout session with URL and order_number

checkout_page_ui.details: Checkout page shows cart items, coupon input, guest checkout option, order confirmation form

about_us_page.details: About Us page (/about-us) loads with team member bios (Dr. Brown, Dr. Temia, Pastor Mike, Rose)

coming_soon_overlay.details: Coming Soon subscription section shows construction sign overlay with 🚧 emojis

navigation_links.details: Quick Order, About Us, Sign In navigation links all work correctly

frontend_ui_tests: Resurrection Sunday countdown visible (00:00:00:00 - Easter passed)
About Us page with team bios
Navigation links work (Quick Order, About Us, Sign In)

mocked_apis.none: All integrations are live (Stripe, Resend, MongoDB)
